sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75038" key="o)rqragori/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθρᾰγορίσκος</orth>, <sense id="n75038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρθαγ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2403.tlg001:1:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pers.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.102</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
